name: Script Execution
description: The execution of a text file that contains code via the interpreter. Adversaries often use scripting languages (like PowerShell, VBScript, or Bash) to execute commands, download payloads, or modify system configurations while evading standard executable detection.

event_logs.description: Script Block Logging; captures full command-line execution of PowerShell scripts.
Process Creation; detects script execution by tracking process launches.
Script Execution; captures script execution via Windows Defender AMSI logging.

sysmon.description: Process Creation; monitors script execution initiated by scripting engines.
File Creation; detects new script files written to disk before execution.

actions: Enable Module Logging (Logs all loaded modules and cmdlets).
Enable Script Block Logging (Captures complete PowerShell script execution history).

rules: Detect script execution with obfuscated, encoded, or remote URLs.
Alert on script executions using specific flags or aliases.

log_sources.Name: ApplicationLogs:SQL
log_sources.Channel: Stored procedure creation or modification with shell invocation (e.g., system(), exec())

log_sources.Name: azure:activity
log_sources.Channel:
Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/runCommand/action: Abnormal initiation of Azure RunCommand jobs or
                PowerShell/Bash payloads

log_sources.Name: EDR:AMSI
log_sources.Channel:
Malicious inline
                C#/script blobs embedded in MSBuild projects if intercepted by
                AMSI-aware loaders (rare but possible via chained LOLBins)

log_sources.Name: etw:Microsoft-Antimalware-Scan-Interface
log_sources.Channel: Amsi/Script content + API verdicts during in-memory staging

log_sources.Name: m365:office
log_sources.Channel: VBA auto_open, auto_close, or document_open events

log_sources.Name: macos:osquery
log_sources.Channel: exec: Unexpected execution of osascript or AppleScript targeting sensitive apps

log_sources.Name: macos:unifiedlog
log_sources.Channel: osascript or AppleScript invocation modifying UI

log_sources.Name: macos:unifiedlog
log_sources.Channel: AppleScript creating login item via 'System Events' dictionary

log_sources.Name: macos:unifiedlog
log_sources.Channel: osascript, AppleScript, or Python execution triggered immediately after HID connection

log_sources.Name: WinEventLog:Application
log_sources.Channel: Stored procedure creation, modification, or xp_cmdshell invocation via SQL logs or SQL Server auditing

log_sources.Name: WinEventLog:PowerShell
log_sources.Channel: Set-ADUser or Set-ADAuthenticationPolicy with MFA attributes disabled

log_sources.Name: WinEventLog:PowerShell
log_sources.Channel: Scripts with references to XML parsing, AES decryption, or gpprefdecrypt logic
